headlines.text: Archive Curator Cleared; a Fifty-Year Love Story Surfaces

kickers.text: The trail narrows. The Ledger walks it slowly, on purpose.
Some stories wait fifty years to be told kindly. This paper can wait one more day for the other one.
The Ledger prints what it knows, as it knows it.
